studyName: Human Dorsal Root Ganglion RNA Landscape Profiling for Neuropathic and Chronic Pain

tables.description: This subject phenotype table contains subject ID, subject ID used on published articles, Race, ethnicity, quantitative or qualitative age, case control status of the subject for neuropathic and chronic pain, presence and details of [n=5 variables; nerve root compression, spinal cord compression, neuropathy/radiculopathy, axial spine pain, and length dependent peripheral neuropathy (LDPN)], presence and duration of pain, visual analogue scale values at maximum intensity (numeric/string), medical history of diabetes, details of (n=3 variables; radiation therapy, chemotherapy or other systemic treatments, and recent opioid or neuromodulatory drug use), type of tissue donation procedure, DRG extraction surgery details, and cause of death.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject for neuropathic and chronic pain

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Age of subject ( quantitative or qualitative )

variables.name: AXIAL_SPINE_PAIN
variables.description: Presence and details of axial spine pain

variables.name: CAUSE_OF_DEATH
variables.description: Cause of death

variables.name: CLINICAL_NEUROPATHY_OR_RADICULOPATHY
variables.description: Presence and details of neuropathy / radiculopathy

variables.name: DIABETIC(Y/N)
variables.description: Medical history of diabetes

variables.name: DONOR_TYPE
variables.description: Type of tissue donation procedure

variables.name: DURATION_OF_NEUROPATHIC_OR_RADICULAR_SYMPTOMS
variables.description: Presence and duration of pain

variables.name: HISPANIC
variables.description: Hispanic ethnicity

variables.name: LDPN
variables.description: Presence and details of length dependent peripheral neuropathy (LDPN)

variables.name: NERVE_ROOT_COMPRESSION
variables.description: Presence and details of nerve root compression

variables.name: PRIOR_CHEMOTHERAPY_OR_OTHER_SYSTEMIC_TREATMENTS
variables.description: Details of chemotherapy or other systemic treatments

variables.name: PRIOR_RADIATION
variables.description: Details of radiation therapy

variables.name: PUBLICATION_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID used on published articles

variables.name: RACE
variables.description: Race of subject

variables.name: RECENT_OPIOID_OR_NEUROMODULATORY_DRUG_USE
variables.description: Details of recent opioid or neuromodulatory drug use

variables.name: SPINAL_CORD_COMPRESSION
variables.description: Presence and details of spinal cord compression

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified subject ID

variables.name: SURGERY_DETAILS
variables.description: DRG extraction surgery details

variables.name: VISUAL_ANALOGUE_SCALE_AT_MAX_INTENSITY
variables.description: Visual analogue scale values at maximum intensity (numeric/string)

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status of sample

variables.name: LIBRARY_TYPE
variables.description: Details of sample assay library type

variables.name: NEUROPATHY_IN_ASSOCIATED DERMATOME
variables.description: Presence / absence of neuropathy in dermatome associated with DRG

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: SEQUENCING_PLATFORM
variables.description: Name of sequencing technology used

variables.name: SPINAL_ATTACHMENT
variables.description: Spinal disk(s) and side on which sample was attached (L = Lumbar, T=Thoracic)

tables.description: The subject consent file includes subject ID, consent information, sex, and subject aliases.

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Sex of subject

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate

tables.description: This data table contains a mapping of study subject IDs to sample IDs. Samples are the final preps submitted for genotyping, sequencing, and/or expression data. For example, if one patient (subject ID) gave one sample, and that sample was processed differently to generate 2 sequencing runs, there would be two rows, both using the same subject ID, but having 2 unique sample IDs.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID
